<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        // Serialize packet_id
        stream << packet_id;
        
        // Serialize username with length prefix
        uint32_t username_len = static_cast<uint32_t>(username.length());
        stream << username_len;
        stream.write(username.data(), username_len);
        
        // Serialize scores count and each score
        uint32_t scores_count = static_cast<uint32_t>(scores.size());
        stream << scores_count;
        for (uint32_t score : scores) {
            stream << score;
        }
        
        // Serialize metadata as null-terminated
        stream << hexi::null_terminated(metadata);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor;
    hexi::stream_base base(allocator, adaptor);
    hexi::ostream stream(base);
    
    packet.serialise(stream);
    
    return adaptor.get_buffer();
}
```</answer>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    size_t offset = 0;
    
    // Read packet_id
    auto packet_id_span = buffer.subspan(offset, sizeof(uint32_t));
    uint32_t packet_id = hexi::read<uint32_t>(packet_id_span);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Read username (length-prefixed)
    auto username_len_span = buffer.subspan(offset, sizeof(uint32_t));
    uint32_t username_len = hexi::read<uint32_t>(username_len_span);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    auto username_data_span = buffer.subspan(offset, username_len);
    std::string username(
        reinterpret_cast<const char*>(username_data_span.data()),
        username_data_span.size()
    );
    offset += username_len;
    
    // Read scores count and scores
    auto score_count_span = buffer.subspan(offset, sizeof(uint32_t));
    uint32_t score_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(score_count_span);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    auto scores_data_span = buffer.subspan(offset, score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores(score_count);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < score_count; ++i) {
        auto score_span = scores_data_span.subspan(i * sizeof(uint32_t), sizeof(uint32_t));
        scores[i] = hexi::read<uint32_t>(score_span);
    }
    offset += score_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Read metadata (null-terminated)
    // Find null terminator
    size_t metadata_len = 0;
    while (offset + metadata_len < buffer.size() && buffer[offset + metadata_len] != 0) {
        metadata_len++;
    }
    
    auto metadata_span = buffer.subspan(offset, metadata_len);
    std::string metadata(
        reinterpret_cast<const char*>(metadata_span.data()),
        metadata_len
    );
    offset += metadata_len + 1; // +1 for null terminator
    
    // Skip any remaining padding
    if (offset < buffer.size()) {
        // Just advance offset, but since we're returning, we don't need to do anything
        // The remaining bytes are padding and can be ignored
    }
    
    NetworkPacket packet;
    packet.packet_id = packet_id;
    packet.username = std::move(username);
    packet.scores = std::move(scores);
    packet.metadata = std::move(metadata);
    
    return packet;
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct UserData {
    uint64_t user_id;
    uint8_t age;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream(user_id, age, name);
    }
};

UserData deserialize_user_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    UserData userData;
    stream(userData);
    return userData;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint8_t version;
    uint8_t flags;
    uint16_t packet_id;
};

PacketHeader read_packet_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    return *reinterpret_cast<const PacketHeader*>(buffer.data());
}

std::string_view read_message_until_delimiter(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    size_t length = 0;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer[i] == 0) {
            length = i;
            break;
        }
    }
    return std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data()), length);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    DataResult result;
    
    // Preview data_type without advancing the stream
    if (buffer.size() >= 1) {
        result.data_type = *adaptor.peek(0);
    } else {
        result.data_type = 0; // Default if buffer too small
    }

    // Read data_type from stream (advances position)
    stream.read(&result.data_type, sizeof(result.data_type));

    // Read item_count
    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    stream.read(&item_count, sizeof(item_count));

    // Calculate required bytes for items
    size_t required_bytes = item_count * 4;
    if (adaptor.size() < 5 + required_bytes) {
        // Handle error if needed, but problem assumes valid buffer
        result.int_items.clear();
        result.float_items.clear();
        return result;
    }

    // Read items based on data_type
    if (result.data_type == 0) { // Integers
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            uint32_t value;
            stream.read(&value, sizeof(value));
            result.int_items[i] = value;
        }
    } else { // Floats
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            float value;
            stream.read(&value, sizeof(value));
            result.float_items[i] = value;
        }
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <stdexcept>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    
    if (!adaptor.check_available(8)) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Insufficient data for packet header");
    }
    
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    PacketHeader header;
    header.magic = stream.read_uint32();
    header.version = stream.read_uint16();
    header.flags = stream.read_uint16();
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    uint32_t header;
    adaptor.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    const uint8_t* msg_data = adaptor.data();
    size_t msg_len = adaptor.size();
    
    for (size_t i = 0; i < msg_len; ++i) {
        if (msg_data[i] == 0) {
            std::string_view message(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(msg_data), i);
            return MessagePacket{header, message};
        }
    }
    
    return MessagePacket{header, std::string_view{}};
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    buffer.write(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    buffer.seek(0);
    uint32_t header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    std::vector<uint8_t> data(data_length);
    buffer.read(data.data(), data_length);
    return BufferData<> { header, data };
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_from_buffer(const hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_peek);
    buffer.peek(result.data(), bytes_to_peek);
    return result;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    // Create a block_allocator with blocks that can hold 'element_count' bytes
    hexi::block_allocator<std::byte, element_count> allocator;
    
    std::cout << "=== Demonstrating Block Allocator Free List Management ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Step 1: Allocate blocks and store their addresses
    std::byte* allocated_blocks[3];
    std::cout << "\n1. Allocating 3 blocks:" << std::endl;
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        allocated_blocks[i] = allocator.allocate();
        std::cout << "Block " << i << " allocated at address: " << reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(allocated_blocks[i]) << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Step 2: Deallocate blocks in reverse order
    std::cout << "\n2. Deallocating blocks in reverse order:" << std::endl;
    for (int i = 2; i >= 0; --i) {
        allocator.deallocate(allocated_blocks[i]);
        std::cout << "Block " << i << " deallocated from address: " << reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(allocated_blocks[i]) << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Step 3: Reallocate and verify LIFO behavior (push/pop management)
    std::cout << "\n3. Re-allocating blocks to test free list reuse:" << std::endl;
    std::byte* reallocated_blocks[3];
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        reallocated_blocks[i] = allocator.allocate();
        std::cout << "Re-allocated block " << i << " at address: " << reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(reallocated_blocks[i]) << std::endl;
        
        // Check if the address matches the originally allocated block (LIFO verification)
        if (reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(reallocated_blocks[i]) == reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(allocated_blocks[i])) {
            std::cout << "✓ Success: Block " << i << " was reused from the free list!" << std::endl;
        } else {
            std::cout << "✗ Failure: Block " << i << " was NOT reused!" << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
    // Clean up remaining blocks
    std::cout << "\n4. Cleaning up remaining blocks:" << std::endl;
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
        allocator.deallocate(reallocated_blocks[i]);
        std::cout << "Block " << i << " cleaned up from address: " << reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(reallocated_blocks[i]) << std::endl;
    }
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Demonstration Complete ===" << std::endl;
}
```</answer>

template<size_t block_size>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {

        }
    }

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path, "rb");
    return buffer.read<uint32_t>();
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path, "wb");
    buffer.write(value);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <filesystem>

size_t get_file_readable_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer;
    buffer.open(file_path);
    if (buffer.is_open()) {
        return buffer.size();
    }
    return 0;
}

bool is_file_buffer_valid(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer;
    buffer.open(file_path);
    return buffer.is_open();
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size() && i < buffer_size; ++i) {
        buffer[i] = static_cast<std::byte>(data[i]);
    }
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < bytes_to_read && i < buffer_size; ++i) {
        result.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(buffer[i]));
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t available_bytes = std::min(bytes_to_preview, buffer.size());
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(available_bytes);
    
    const std::byte* data_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    for (size_t i = 0; i < available_bytes; ++i) {
        result[i] = static_cast<uint8_t>(data_ptr[i]);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    // Write the length of the string as a 32-bit unsigned integer
    writer.write_uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(str.length()));
    // Write the string data as bytes
    writer.write_bytes(str.data(), str.length());
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    // Read the length prefix
    uint32_t length = reader.read_uint32();
    // Create a string of the appropriate size
    std::string result;
    result.resize(length);
    // Read the bytes directly into the string's buffer
    reader.read_bytes(&result[0], length);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string result;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(result);
    return result;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const char* src_start = static_cast<const char*>(src);
    const char* src_end = src_start + src_len;
    const char* dst_start = static_cast<const char*>(dst);
    const char* dst_end = dst_start + dst_len;
    
    return (src_start < dst_end) && (dst_start < src_end);
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (!source || !destination) {
        return false;
    }
    
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        std::memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {

    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < Size; ++i) {
        target[i] = value;

    return target;
}

bool verify_filled_array(const auto& arr, std::uint8_t expected_value) {

        if (element != expected_value) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

            info.total_read = e.total_read();

            info.occurred = true;
        }
    }
    return info;
}

UnderrunInfo safe_read_with_underrun_check(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, void* destination, std::size_t length) {

        info.total_read = buffer.total_read();
        info.buff_size = buffer.size();

            info.total_read = e.total_read();
            info.buff_size = e.buff_size();

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size;
    details.total_read = e.total_read;
    details.limit_or_size = e.buff_size;
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size;
    details.total_read = e.total_read;
    details.limit_or_size = e.read_limit;
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    
    // Serialize packet_id as varint
    auto id_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(packet.packet_id);
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), id_bytes.begin(), id_bytes.end());
    
    // Serialize tags using prefixed_varint
    auto tags_size_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(packet.tags.size());
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tags_size_bytes.begin(), tags_size_bytes.end());
    
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        auto tag_len_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(tag.size());
        buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tag_len_bytes.begin(), tag_len_bytes.end());
        buffer.insert(buffer.end(), tag.begin(), tag.end());
    }
    
    // Serialize data using prefixed_varint
    auto data_len_bytes = hexi::varint_encode(packet.data.size());
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), data_len_bytes.begin(), data_len_bytes.end());
    buffer.insert(buffer.end(), packet.data.begin(), packet.data.end());
    
    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    size_t pos = 0;
    
    // Deserialize packet_id
    packet.packet_id = hexi::varint_decode<uint32_t>(buffer, pos);
    
    // Deserialize tags count
    size_t tags_size = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, pos);
    packet.tags.resize(tags_size);
    
    // Deserialize each tag
    for (size_t i = 0; i < tags_size; ++i) {
        size_t tag_len = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, pos);
        packet.tags[i].resize(tag_len);
        for (size_t j = 0; j < tag_len; ++j) {
            packet.tags[i][j] = static_cast<char>(buffer[pos++]);
        }
    }
    
    // Deserialize data
    size_t data_len = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, pos);
    packet.data.resize(data_len);
    for (size_t j = 0; j < data_len; ++j) {
        packet.data[j] = static_cast<char>(buffer[pos++]);
    }
    
    return packet;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream stream(allocator, adaptor);

    stream << packet.header;
    stream << static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.length());
    stream << packet.data;
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    stream << packet.footer;

    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> pool;
    
    PoolObject* obj1 = allocator.allocate();
    allocator.construct(obj1, 1, 3.14);
    pool.push_back(obj1);
    
    PoolObject* obj2 = allocator.allocate();
    allocator.construct(obj2, 2, 6.28);
    pool.push_back(obj2);
    
    PoolObject* obj3 = allocator.allocate();
    allocator.construct(obj3, 3, 9.42);
    pool.push_back(obj3);
    
    return pool;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <cstring>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::memory_buffer buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Serialize message_id
    uint32_t msg_id_be = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(&msg_id_be, sizeof(msg_id_be));
    
    // Serialize data_values
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data;
    for (uint16_t val : packet.data_values) {
        be_data.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.write_container(be_data);
    
    // Serialize checksum
    uint32_t checksum_be = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(&checksum_be, sizeof(checksum_be));
    
    return buffer.data();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Deserialize message_id
    uint32_t msg_id_be;
    stream.read(&msg_id_be, sizeof(msg_id_be));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(msg_id_be);
    
    // Deserialize data_values count
    uint32_t count_be;
    stream.read(&count_be, sizeof(count_be));
    uint32_t count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count_be);
    
    // Deserialize data_values
    std::vector<uint16_t> be_data(count);
    stream.read_container(be_data);
    packet.data_values.resize(count);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        packet.data_values[i] = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_data[i]);
    }
    
    // Deserialize checksum
    uint32_t checksum_be;
    stream.read(&checksum_be, sizeof(checksum_be));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum_be);
    
    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolHeader header;
    
    // Extract message_id using span
    auto header_span = stream.span(4);
    uint32_t msg_id_be;
    std::memcpy(&msg_id_be, header_span.data(), sizeof(msg_id_be));
    stream.skip(4);
    
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(msg_id_be);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

output.reasoning:
<think>Okay, let's tackle this problem step by step. The user wants us to use the Hexi library for serializing and deserializing scientific measurement data with runtime endianness conversion. The key points here are handling endianness correctly during both serialization and deserialization, especially using the specific functions mentioned like conditional_reverse and little_to_native_inplace.

First, I need to understand the structure of MeasurementData. It has sensor_id, a vector of temperatures (floats), and pressure (double). The serialization function should convert these values to little-endian before writing, while deserialization reads them and converts back to native endianness.

Starting with the serialize_measurement_data function. The MeasurementData's serialise method needs to write the sensor_id directly, then each temperature after converting from native to little-endian using conditional_reverse with runtime parameters. Similarly, the pressure should be converted. So for each float in temperatures, we apply conditional_reverse with std::endian::native and std::endian::little, then write. Same for the double pressure.

Wait, but how does the stream adaptor work here? The serialise method probably takes a stream adaptor that provides write methods. So in the serialise method for serialization, we would write each field after conversion. For example:

adaptor.write(data.sensor_id);
for each temp in data.temperatures:
    auto converted_temp = hexi::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
    adaptor.write(converted_temp);
auto converted_pressure = hexi::conditional_reverse(data.pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
        adaptor.write(sensor_id);
        for (const auto& temp : temperatures) {
            auto converted = hexi::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(converted);
        }
        auto converted_pressure = hexi::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
        adaptor.write(converted_pressure);
    }
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor.read(sensor_id);
        // Assuming temperatures vector is pre-sized or will be resized appropriately
        for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
            float temp_val;
            adaptor.read(temp_val);
            hexi::little_to_native_inplace(temp_val);
            temp = temp_val;
        }
        double pressure_val;
        adaptor.read(pressure_val);
        hexi::little_to_native_inplace(pressure_val);
        pressure = pressure_val;
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    hexi::BufferAdaptor adaptor;
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    return adaptor.to_vector();
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::BufferAdaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    MeasurementData data;
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::BufferAdaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    auto name_view = adaptor.view();
    adaptor.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    adaptor.read(sensor_id);
    adaptor.skip(adaptor.available());
    return {sensor_id, std::string_view(name_view)};
}
